DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: D. Cameron Baker, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Office of the City Attorney, 1390 Market Street, Sixth Floor, San Francisco, CA 94102, 415-554-3963, appearing on behalf of defenant and moving pary the City and County of San Francisco. Norman Newhous, Esq., 495 Seaport Court, Suite 103, Redwould City, CA 94063, 650-365-8534, appearing on behalf of the plaintiff and opposing party Denise Johnson-Kula. Sharon G. Pratt, Esq., Lanahan & Reilley LLP, 19200 Stevens Creek Boulevard, #240, Cupertino, CA, 95014, appeared on behalf of defendant California Water Service Company.

After argument Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Demurrer was SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Prevailing party shall prepare the order. Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay. Reported by Beldon Yee (302/JT)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sharon G. Pratt, Esq., Lanahan & Reilley LLP, 19200 Stevens Creek Boulevard, #240, Cupertino, CA, 95014, appeared on behalf of defendant and moving party California Water Service Company. D. Joinder Of City And County Of San Francisco And San Francisco Public Utilities Commissioner In Demurrer Of California Water Service Co.
Off Calendar Sep-09-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: D. Cameron Baker, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Office of the City Attorney, 1390 Market Street, Sixth Floor, San Francisco, CA 94102, 415-554-3963, appearing on behalf of defenant and moving party the City and County of San Francisco and San Francisco Public Utilities Commissioner. Norman Newhous, Esq., 495 Seaport Court, Suite 103, Redwood City, CA 94063, 650-365-8534, appearing on behalf of the plaintiff and opposing party Denise Johnson-Kula. Sharon G. Pratt, Esq., Lanahan & Reilley LLP, 19200 Stevens Creek Boulevard, #240, Cupertino, CA, 95014, appeared on behalf of defendant California Water Service Company.

After argument Defendants City and County of San Francisco's and San Francisco Public Utilities Commission's Jointer In demurrer of California Water Service Company was SUSTAINED without leave to amend.
